productDisplayName: FILA Men Dirk White Sports Shoes
description: A perfect blend of fashion and comfort, the fila Dirk makes for a great casual shoe and running trainer. Packed with features and crafted in a low profile silhouette, this shoe makes for a great buy.UpperHeavily meshed upper with strategically placed synthetic leather overlays for absolute breathable comfort and shoe structureLacing system for a snug, customised FitPadded tongue and collar with a textile lining for a custom fit and enhanced breathable comfortPadded footbed for all-day comfort and impact protection, which is removable to accommodate an orthoticMidsolePhylon midsole for lightweight comfort and impact protectionOutsoleTPR outsole with waffle pattern lugs and a decoupled heel for absolute grip and traction and easy heel strike to toe off motionFlex grooves on the forefoot for easy movementArched midfoot with a transparent trusstic shank for ergonomic comfortScooped heel for enhanced cushioning to the backfootShoe careWipe surface with a dry, clean cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
